input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.3.5.2
            TITLE: removal of any driver equipment during a dynamic event will result in disqualification.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.5.2: Removal of any Driver Equipment during a Dynamic event will result in Disqualification.
D.3.5.2 Removal of any Driver Equipment during a Dynamic event will result in Disqualification.

final_answer: D.3.5.2 Removal of any Driver Equipment during a Dynamic event will result in Disqualification.
